sglang.title: [SWA] Ensure we use pre-computed SWA cache location during prefill
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

When a sliding-window attention (SWA) layer already has a pre-computed swa_loc, return it directly instead of re-translating from the full cache location.
This fixes an issue where during prefill, the pre-computed SWA cache location was being ignored.

Upstream from: https://github.com/meta

sglang.title: Replace SGLANG_DSV4_FP4_EXPERTS env with ModelConfig.is_fp4_experts attr (auto-detect)

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Drop SGLANG_DSV4_FP4_EXPERTS env entirely; sglang now auto-detects routed-expert layout (mxfp4-packed vs converted FP8) by probing the safetensors header.
Promote the value to a typed ModelConfig.is_fp4_experts attribute and thread it through Fp8Config / DeepGemmMoeQuantInfo / TopK carriers

This is enabled with --disaggregation-decode-enable-radix-cache on the decode server.

sglang.title: [Bug] Size mamba mappings from req pool, not mamba pool
sglang.author: hnyls2002

HybridReqToTokenPool._init_mamba_pool allocated req_index_to_mamba_index_mapping and the ping-pong mapping from its size parameter, which is the mamba pool size. But these mappings are indexed by req_pool_idx from the request pool, so they should be sized from the request pool buffer.
Why this is a

`--enable-dp-attention` together with `--enable-mixed-chunk` crashes
deterministically at the first chunked-prefill iteration that merges a

in `server_args.py` rejecting it, but no scheduler iteration with
`forward

sglang.title: Reserve slot 0 as padding in all req pools
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Mirror KV pool's padding slot 0 design across all request pools: each buffer gets a +1 padding row at index 0, free_slots starts at 1, size still represents logical capacity so external code is unchanged.

Changes

ReqToTokenPool: req_to_token shape (size, ...) -> (size + 1, ...); free_slot

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix persistent_topk inter-CTA init race on RadixRowState
vllm.author: zyongye
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The RadixRowState per-group state (in topk_workspace) was initialized inside the kernel by CTA-0 only, with a plain global store followed by an intra-CTA __syncthreads(). vllm.title: [Bugfix][Gemma 4] Clamp soft-token estimate to max_soft_tokens
vllm.author: hnt2601
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
For extreme-aspect-ratio images (e.g. 3x900), the prompt-side Gemma4ProcessingInfo._compute_num_soft_tokens returned more soft tokens than the HF Gemma 4 image processor's vision tower actually emits (which is capped at max_soft_tokens). The mismatch crashed _merge_multimodal_embeddings mid-
